attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 RPRD.ITEM_KEY                                                  AS PRODUCT_KEY
,COALESCE(STG.EO_NODE_LEVEL_1_KEY, -999)                       AS NODE_LEVEL_1_KEY
,COALESCE(SBU.BUSINESS_UNIT_KEY, -999)                          AS NODE_LEVEL_2_KEY
,COALESCE(SPF.PRODUCT_FAMILY_KEY, -999)                         AS NODE_LEVEL_3_KEY
,COALESCE(SPT.EO_PRODUCT_TYPE_KEY, -999)                           AS PRODUCT_TYPE_KEY
,COALESCE(SPS.EO_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_KEY, -999)                       AS PRODUCT_SUB_GROUP_KEY
,RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID                                             AS PRODUCT_ID
,CAST(RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_HIER_COMPANY_ID AS VARCHAR(45))           AS NODE_LEVEL_0_NAME
,RPRD.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID                                    AS NODE_LEVEL_1_NAME
,RPRD.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID                                       AS NODE_LEVEL_2_NAME
,RPRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID                                   AS NODE_LEVEL_3_NAME
,RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID                                        AS PRODUCT_TYPE_ID
,COALESCE(
  (
   CASE
    WHEN RPRD.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE'
    THEN RPRD.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID
    ELSE RPRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
   END
  ), 'UNKNOWN')                                           AS PRODUCT_SUB_GROUP_ID
,NPRD.SS_CODE                                                   AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,NPRD.SERVICEABLE_PRODUCT_FLG                                   AS SERVICE_ITEM_FLAG
,RPRD.BK_MANUFACTURING_PLANT_ID                                 AS MANUFACTURING_PLANT_NAME
,CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1))                                       AS INTEGRATION_UNIT_FLAG
,CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1))                                       AS ALLOW_PORTS_FLAG
,CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1))                                       AS SERVICE_FRU_FLAG
,CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1))                                       AS PRODUCT_FORECAST_ID
,NII.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE                                 AS INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE
,CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1))                                       AS FCS_PERIOD_NAME
,RPRD.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION                                       AS PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION
,CAST(CASE
    WHEN NII.OFFSET_FLG = '='
    THEN NULL
    WHEN NII.OFFSET_FLG='2'
    THEN '2'
    ELSE '1'
   END AS VARCHAR(3))                                        AS OFFSET_FLAG
,CAST(RPRD.RU_OS_FEATURESET_NAME AS VARCHAR(24))                AS IOS_FEATURESET_ID
,RPRD.RU_OS_RELEASE_NUMBER                                      AS IOS_RELEASE_TRAIN_ID
,RPRD.RU_OS_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION                                   AS IOS_DESCRIPTION
,CAST(RPRD.RU_OS_IMAGE_NAME AS VARCHAR(64))                     AS IOS_IMAGE
,RPRD.RU_OS_FEATURESET_DESCRIPTION                              AS IOS_FEATURE_DESCRIPTION
,NPRD.PRODUCT_PRICING_CATEGORY_CD                               AS PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CODE
,CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1))                                       AS PACKAGE_CATEGORY_CODE
,CAST(CASE
    WHEN RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID IN ('XDSL','PHONE','ROUTER','SERVER','SWITCH','GATEWAY','SERVRNC','FUNCSYSTM','MULTIPROD', 'APPLIANCE')
     THEN 'CHASSIS'
    WHEN RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID IN ('BOARD','POWER','MEMORY','ASSMBLY','DEVICES','ASSEMBLY','ACCESSORY')
     OR (RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID = 'CONFIGSW' AND RPRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID NOT  IN ('SYSTEM','SPARE'))
    THEN 'CARD'
    WHEN RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID IN ('MULTI','NETMGMT','CONTRACT','PACKAGED','SOFTWARE','SWIFTALONE','SWSUBSCRIP','APPSWIND')
     OR (RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID IN ('BASE','FEATURE','CONFIGDOC','CONFIGSW','DOC') AND RPRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID IN ('SYSTEM','SPARE'))
    THEN 'SOFTWARE'
    WHEN RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID ='CABLE'
    THEN 'CABLE'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
   END AS VARCHAR(720))                                      AS CSM_ITEM_TYPE_CODE
,CAST(EOSD.END_OF_SALE_DT AS TIMESTAMP(0))                      AS ENDOF_SALE_DATE
,CAST(EOSD.LAST_SUPPORT_DT AS TIMESTAMP(0))                     AS ENDOF_SUPPORT_DATE
,RPRD.RU_COMMISSIONABLE_STATUS_CODE                             AS COMMISSION_STATUS_CODE
,CASE
  WHEN RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID = 'CHARGES'
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE 'N'
 END                                                            AS CHARGES_FLAG
,CASE
  WHEN RPRD.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE'
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE 'N'
 END                                                            AS SERVICE_FLAG
,RPRD.RU_CUSTOMER_ORDERABLE_FLAG CUSTOMER_ORDERABLE_FLAG
,CASE
  WHEN RPRD.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= NPRD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
  THEN RPRD.EDW_CREATE_DTM
  ELSE NPRD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
 END                                                            AS CREATE_DATE
,CASE
  WHEN RPRD.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= NPRD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
  THEN RPRD.EDW_CREATE_USER
  ELSE NPRD.EDW_CREATE_USER
 END                                                            AS CREATE_USER_ID
,CASE
 WHEN (RPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM        >= NPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME AND RPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >= COALESCE(EOSD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)))
 THEN RPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 WHEN (NPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME   >=RPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                AND NPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>= COALESCE(EOSD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)))
 THEN NPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
 ELSE EOSD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
END                                                            AS UPDATE_DATE
,CASE
  WHEN RPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >= NPRD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
  THEN RPRD.EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ELSE NPRD.EDW_UPDATE_USER
 END                                                            AS UPDATE_USER_ID
,CAST (NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))                                    AS MFG_END_OF_SALE_DATE
,CASE
  WHEN RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID IN ('FUNCSYSTM', 'GATEWAY', 'PHONE', 'ROUTER', 'SERVER', 'SWITCH', 'APPSWIND')
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE 'N'
 END                                                            AS CHASSIS_PRODUCT_FLAG
,CAST(CASE
  WHEN NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = 'UNKNO'
  THEN -99999
  ELSE NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
 END AS INTEGER)                                                AS EXPENSE_GL_ACCOUNT_ID
,CAST(CASE
  WHEN NGLA1.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = 'UNKNO'
  THEN -99999
  ELSE NGLA1.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
 END AS INTEGER)                                                AS ENCUMBRANCE_GL_ACCOUNT_ID
,CAST(CASE
  WHEN NGLA2.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = 'UNKNO'
  THEN -99999
  ELSE NGLA2.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
 END AS INTEGER)                                                AS SALES_GL_ACCOUNT_ID
,NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME                                       AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME

FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS                               RPRD

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPRD
ON RPRD.ITEM_KEY  = NPRD.ITEM_KEY
AND DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'   /* ADDED AS PART OF M&A JUN10 Q4FY18*/

LEFT JOIN
(
 SELECT
    NELP.BK_PRODUCT_ID                   AS BK_PRODUCT_ID
   ,NEBMG.LAST_SUPPORT_DT                AS LAST_SUPPORT_DT
   ,NEBMG.END_OF_SALE_DT                 AS END_OF_SALE_DT
    ,NEBMG.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                     AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 FROM
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_END_OF_LIFE_PRODUCT              NELP
 INNER JOIN
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_EOL_BULLETIN_MILESTONE_GROUP     NEBMG
   ON NELP.BK_EOL_BULLETIN_PRODUCT_TYP_CD   = NEBMG.BK_EOL_BULLETIN_PRODUCT_TYP_CD
  AND NELP.BK_END_OF_LIFE_REQUEST_NUM       = NEBMG.BK_END_OF_LIFE_REQUEST_NUM
  AND NELP.source_deleted_flg               = 'N'

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY NELP.BK_PRODUCT_ID ORDER BY NELP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC )=1

) EOSD
ON RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID                          = EOSD.BK_PRODUCT_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM                         NII
ON RPRD.ITEM_KEY                               = NII.ITEM_KEY
AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT                  = 1

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP              STG
ON STG.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID                  = RPRD.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_BUSINESS_UNIT                 SBU
ON SBU.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID                        = RPRD.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_PRODUCT_FAMILY                SPF
ON SPF.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID                       = RPRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TYPE                  SPT
ON SPT.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID                         = RPRD.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID


LEFT JOIN (SELECT EO_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_KEY,BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP  GROUP BY 1,2)            SPS
ON SPS.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID= COALESCE(
      (CASE WHEN RPRD.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'SERVICE'
         THEN RPRD.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID
         ELSE RPRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
         END),
       'UNKNOWN')

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT                 NGLA
ON NII.EXPENSE_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY                  = NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT                 NGLA1
ON NII.ENCUMBERANCE_GL_ACCT_KEY                = NGLA1.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT                 NGLA2
ON NII.SALES_ACCOUNT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY            = NGLA2.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
